name: Venison Stew
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds venison (up to 3 lbs), cut into 1-inch cubes
1 small green pepper, seeded and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Marinate cubed venison in French dressing for 12 to 24 hours in the refrigerator.
2. Drain off the salad dressing and place the venison in a Crock-Pot.
3. Stir in the remaining ingredients.
4. Cover and cook on Low for 8 to 10 hours.
5. Serves 6 to 8
